biological_process.description: chaperone mediated protein folding independent of cofactor
positive regulation of establishment of protein localization to telomere
positive regulation of protein localization to Cajal body
positive regulation of telomerase RNA localization to Cajal body
positive regulation of telomere maintenance via telomerase

function_descriptions: Component of the chaperonin-containing T-complex (TRiC), a molecular chaperone complex that assists the folding of actin, tubulin and other proteins upon ATP hydrolysis (PubMed:25467444, PubMed:36493755, PubMed:35449234, PubMed:37193829). The TRiC complex mediates the folding of WRAP53/TCAB1, thereby regulating telomere maintenance (PubMed:25467444). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:25467444, ECO:0000269|PubMed:35449234, ECO:0000269|PubMed:36493755, ECO:0000269|PubMed:37193829}.

pathways.pathway: Prefoldin mediated transfer of substrate  to CCT/TriC
Cooperation of PDCL (PhLP1) and TRiC/CCT in G-protein beta folding
Association of TriC/CCT with target proteins during biosynthesis
Formation of tubulin folding intermediates by CCT/TriC
